# drift: since last sync new.go added and old.go deleted while SPEC untouched -> exit 1
exec git init
exec git config user.email t@example.com
exec git config user.name t
exec git config commit.gpgsign false

# commit 1: SPEC lists root.go + old.go, both present (in sync). Add only these
# paths so the new.go template stays untracked and out of the anchor tree.
exec git add pkg/SPEC.md pkg/root.go pkg/old.go
exec git commit -m init

# commit 2: delete old.go, add new.go (from template); SPEC untouched -> drift.
exec git rm pkg/old.go
cp new.go.tmpl pkg/new.go
exec git add pkg/new.go
exec git commit -m edit

! psy check
stdout 'pkg: NG'
stdout 'new\.go \(added\)'
stdout 'old\.go \(removed\)'

-- pkg/root.go --
package pkg
-- pkg/old.go --
package pkg
-- new.go.tmpl --
package pkg
-- pkg/SPEC.md --
---
package: pkg
---

# 文件

- `root.go` — r
- `old.go` — o
